[{'date': '2026-07-16', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Always new affirmations', 'content': 'I have had “I am” for years. Recently I got a good deal on the premium subscription and purchased. I will say that the app is phenomenal with or without paying the premium fee! I find it amazing that they always give new affirmations, they do not just repeat the same collection. In awe just thinking about the years and years of fresh affirmations, even when I was using the app for free!', 'author': 'MRSmith322', 'version': '6.45.0'}, {'date': '2026-07-16', 'rating': 1, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Misleading Free Trial & Unexpected Annual Charge', 'content': 'I signed up because the app advertised a free trial and stated that I would receive a reminder before the trial ended. Unfortunately, I never received any reminder or notification.

I planned to cancel my subscription, but shortly after midnight I discovered I had already been charged for an entire yearly subscription instead of the monthly plan I expected. The charge was significant, and despite contacting support, I was unable to get a refund.

This experience felt very misleading. If you’re considering this app, make sure you manually set your own reminder to cancel because you may not receive the notification they promise. Also, double-check your subscription settings carefully, as mine renewed to an annual plan automatically.

I would not recommend this app based on my experience.', 'author': 'Garry$8', 'version': '6.45.0'}, {'date': '2026-07-16', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'GB', 'title': 'Brightening my day', 'content': 'Love the app , little boundless joy', 'author': 'Jada- Durham UK', 'version': '6.45.0'}, {'date': '2026-07-16', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Saving grace', 'content': 'The only way I can keep affirmations coming all day!', 'author': 'Motheriam', 'version': '6.45.0'}, {'date': '2026-07-16', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Love it', 'content': 'I love this app has made my life grow with abundance and my self esteem is ascending to where I want it to be 😊', 'author': 'Jordan8319', 'version': '6.45.0'}, {'date': '2026-07-15', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'What a difference!', 'content': 'My mindset has SO greatly improved! You should get this too!', 'author': 'ScottG77', 'version': '6.43.0'}, {'date': '2026-07-04', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'CA', 'title': 'Peace over worry', 'content': 'I choose joy, peace, and faith today.', 'author': 'MaineAuman', 'version': '6.43.0'}, {'date': '2026-07-04', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'GB', 'title': 'Great mood booster', 'content': 'Love these reminders, so grateful for them!', 'author': 'Jubags111', 'version': '6.43.0'}, {'date': '2026-07-04', 'rating': 3, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'Annoying lying notifications', 'content': 'I’m about to delete this app, it’s driving me nuts. 
  Recently within the last couple months I’ve started getting notifications throughout the day about ‘losing my streak’ even though I’ve already checked the app. Now I’m getting about 6 notifications a day about ‘losing my streak’, ‘only one freeze available’ and now ‘start a new streak’ which came an hour after a ‘save streak’ message on the same day. It makes no sense and it’s driving me crazy. 
  My other biggest complaint is that when I open the app and swipe once to a new page there’s always an annoying something that pops up from the app. I feel like I can’t even use the app because it’s always interrupting. These are different messages, like ads to buy the subscription, insistence to share the message, pop ups to recommend changing backgrounds. I’ve been using the app over a year. I know how to share and I know how to change backgrounds, stop interrupting my actual use of the app - at very least so quickly.
  Additionally, but less annoyingly, some of the backgrounds are animated and have sound and they will interrupt music or podcasts you may have playing in the background, easy enough to fix- switch to a background not animated. 

I wish the free background options had a few more scenic options that weren’t so bright but that just a personal preference from someone very light sensitive. I do like that the free background options change every so often to include different images - don’t get attached to favorite images it might not be free next time but it’s nice to see something new.', 'author': 'Mads4566', 'version': '6.43.0'}, {'date': '2026-07-04', 'rating': 5, 'country': 'US', 'title': 'I am Inspired', 'content': 'I feel inspired daily with this app and I share it with my friends. While they responded and were polite, they ultimately told me there was nothing they could do.

Had this issue been resolved, I would have given a higher rating. However, being charged $65 before my trial was over and receiving no refund left me feeling taken advantage of.
